events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, lead singer and co-founder of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick's Energy
angles.copy: Still defying gravity and expectations at 83. What's your favourite Rolling Stones track that perfectly captures Mick Jagger's legendary energy?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' "Video Killed The Radio Star" being its very first broadcast music video.

angles.name: MTV Impact
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV declared 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it, though? Or did it just change the game completely?

events.title: Oasis' Definitely Maybe turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album, "Definitely Maybe," on August 29, 1994, marking 32 years since its release.

angles.name: Britpop Anthem
angles.copy: Thirty-two years of 'Definitely Maybe'. What's the track from Oasis's debut album that still gives you that undeniable Britpop swagger?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, began on August 15, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people descended on a field for three days of peace, love, and music. What's your iconic Woodstock moment?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, would have been 91
events.blurb: The music world remembers the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977 and would have been 91.

angles.name: The King's Legacy
angles.copy: Still the King. On the anniversary of his passing, what's your go-to Elvis track that proves his timeless appeal?

events.title: The Beatles' Abbey Road turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album "Abbey Road" in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring its famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: 57 years since the Fab Four gave us *Abbey Road*. What's the track that makes you want to walk across that zebra crossing?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the distinctive voice and frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th to Chrissie Hynde! What's your favourite Pretenders anthem that showcases her unmistakable rock edge?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman and rock icon Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Our Kid's Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid turns 54! What's the quintessential Liam Gallagher moment or lyric that perfectly sums him up?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' album turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's seminal solo album "Imagine," featuring the iconic title track, was released in the UK on October 8, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine's Message
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. What's the enduring message of this timeless anthem that resonates most with you today?

events.title: The first iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple introduced the first generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Remember the click wheel? 25 years since the original iPod changed music forever. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, "Dr. No," in 1962.

angles.name: Next Bond Theme
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred. Happy James Bond Day! If you could pick any artist to sing the next Bond theme, who would it be?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The world remembers John Lennon, the visionary Beatle and peace activist, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, John Lennon's message of peace and love still resonates. What's his most impactful lyric for you?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: Legendary British comedian and actor John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: From dead parrots to silly walks, John Cleese turns 87 today! What's your all-time favourite moment from his incredible career?

events.title: The Beatles' White Album turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eponymous double album, widely known as "The White Album," on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Gems
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years of 'The White Album'. With its incredible diversity, what's a hidden gem on this Beatles masterpiece you still love?
